name: copper_caverns
description: A network of copper-rich tunnels beneath the foothills. The miners who worked here left suddenly, and the lower shafts were sealed for reasons no one will speak of.
note_texts: Scratches mark the tunnel walls, too deep and wide for any pickaxe.
Old mining equipment, twisted and bent. Whatever was here left in a hurry.
A miner's torn note: 'We broke through to something below. The foreman sealed the lower shaft. He won't say why.'
Tremors from below. Dust falls from the ceiling in slow waves. Something stirs.
The sealed shaft gives way. A vast cavern opens beneath — the Collapsed Mine lies ahead.
unlock_message: You have uncovered the Collapsed Mine — face what lurks in the deep.
